content.body:
Any chance we could run these snippets with some internal test runner and log the boundaries? e.g. d8 (the v8 shell) has `--print-scopes`.

The reason is that for the spec text I'd allow the maxium boundary possible but it would be nice if we could recommend where generators put range start/end if all engines agree somewhat.
